title: Oceanview Hotel
hero.title: Wake Up to the Ocean
hero.subtitle: Where every stay is smooth sailing and every sunset steals the show
newsletter.title: Stay in the Loop
newsletter.subtitle: Get exclusive offers — don’t let the tide pass you by!
room1.name: Standard Room
room1.desc: A cozy space where comfort meets practicality — no bells and whistles, but it hits the sweet spot without missing a beat
room1.meta: Queen bed • City view • Free Wi-Fi
room2.name: Deluxe Room
room2.desc: Step things up with extra space and style — the kind of upgrade that doesn’t just raise the bar, it moves the goalposts
room3.name: Suite
room3.desc: Live large in a suite that pulls out all the stops — because when it rains luxury, we don’t just get wet, we make a splash
room3.meta: King bed • Living area • Panoramic view
rooms.title: Our Rooms
features.title: Hotel Features
feature1.name: Housekeeping
feature1.desc: Our housekeeping keeps things shipshape and Bristol fashion — we don’t just clean up, we tidy up your worries so you can rest easy.
feature2.name: Room Service
feature2.desc: Feeling peckish? Our room service brings the goods straight to your door — because good things come to those who don’t have to get out of bed.
feature3.name: Free Wi-Fi
feature3.desc: Stay connected at lightning speed — whether you’re tying up loose ends or surfing the web, we’ve got you covered (no strings attached).
about.title: About Oceanview Hotel
about.story: Nestled by the shoreline, Oceanview Hotel is where relaxation and refinement go hand in hand. Since opening our doors, we’ve been helping guests unwind, recharge, and soak in the view — no strings attached, just sea breeze included.
about.mission: Our mission is simple: to make every stay feel like a home away from home, only better. From thoughtful service to unforgettable views, we aim to make waves in hospitality — in the best possible way.
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.text: Questions, special requests, or just testing the waters? Drop us a line — we’re all ears.
contact.name: John Doe
